core_loop_signature: prepare hidden squads reveal ambushes deny routes manage morale and support skills protect command bunker through scripted assault waves
differentiation_axes: hidden deployment and reveal timing instead of always-visible tower builds
two to four forked mountain routes instead of fixed three-lane horizontal defense
command bunker durability plus morale pressure plus infiltrator theft loss condition
terrain-trigger actions such as rockslide and bridge demolition
reserve squad rotation and retreat management instead of static tower-only defense
chapter modifiers including fog snow and feint assaults
forbidden_template_reuse: no left-base versus right-enemy march template
no single tiny map repeated without route or terrain variation
no reuse of another game's exact defense roster or support rhythm
no endless survival loop replacing scripted regroup windows

map_content_budget.play_area_model: central bunker defense inside a forked mountain pass with ridges tunnels bridges and fallback barricade rings
map_content_budget.route_or_region_count: 2-4 active assault routes plus 1 reserve transfer corridor
map_content_budget.interactive_regions: 1 bunker core zone, at least 2 ridge firing nests, at least 1 terrain trigger point, at least 1 extraction edge for infiltrators
map_content_budget.camera_or_scroll_model: fixed mission board with minor screen shake and route-focused alerts, no free scroll required

special_rules: unrevealed squads cannot be directly targeted until activated
infiltrators can steal the flag if they reach the bunker core
morale drops from repeated breaches and recovers through successful holds
some terrain triggers are one-use and alter later routes
risk_reward_systems: holding reveals for a late ambush grants stronger burst value but increases breach risk
saving supplies for support skills reduces upgrade tempo
chasing supply drops can expose a route temporarily

asset_variety_budget.minimum_distinct_sprite_families: at least 14 gameplay sprite families across player, enemy, support, and effect roles
asset_variety_budget.asset_reuse_note: Do not reuse a previous tower-defense roster or the same wall, castle, or fantasy unit family; prioritize mountain warfare silhouettes and hidden-slot readability.
